Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Aug-29-2013 Continued To Dec-06-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling, which was not contested, on Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction. The Court has received a brief of Plaintiff Wells Fargo N.A. Pursuant to the Court's Order of June 26, 2013. No other party filed a brief. For good cause shown, the Order to Show Cause is continued to December 6, 2013, to allow the new arbitrator (Judge Letteau) to resolve the matter. The temporary restraining order remains in effect pending the hearing on December 6, 2013. Each party may file a supplemental brief up to 5 pages regarding the status of the arbitration by November 27, 2013. Courtesy copies of these supplemental briefs must be delivered to Department 302 on the day of filing. Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-18-2013 Continued To Sep-04-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Jun-26-2013 Continued To Aug-29-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
The Order to Show Cause is continued to August 29, 2013, to allow the new arbitrator to entertain a motion re interim relief. The temporary restraining order remains in effect pending the hearing on August 29, 2013. Each party may file a supplemental brief up to 5 pages regarding the status of the arbitration by August 23, 2013. Courtesy copies of these supplemental briefs must be delivered to Department 302 on the day of filing. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Apr-30-2013 Continued To Jun-26-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: susan rushakoff, esq., 415.788.6151, for plaintiff wells fargo, n.a.; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction is continued to June 26, 2013. The temporary restraining order remains in effect to permit the arbitrator to decide this matter. The temporary restraining order will expire once the arbitrator rules on plaintiff's request for injunctive relief. Each party may file a 5 page brief regarding the status of the arbitration and/or any motion for equitable relief by June 19, 2013. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
